text:
is the mother of Sasha Braus and the wife of Artur Braus.

Appearance

Lisa has brown hair tied in a bun. When she visited Sasha's grave she wore black clothing.

Personality

From what is seen, Lisa is a kind, affectionate woman. When Gabi and Falco first arrive, she attempts to affectionately nuzzle Gabi's hair, and although Gabi swats her hand away, it does not upset her, understanding that Gabi must have been through a lot. She cares about her family very much, and was deeply saddened by Sasha's death.

Story

Marley arc

Lisa and her husband go to their daughter's grave and mourn her.

War for Paradis arc

Kaya brings two young runaways to the Braus family's farm and Lisa and her husband agree to give the children food. As she is serving the food, Lisa tries to be friendly with one of the children, but is spurned for her efforts. Assuming the child has been traumatized by something, Lisa elects to give her space.

Along with her husband and the children, Lisa goes to Nicolo's restaurant, telling the kids to eat a lot. Later, Nicolo tells them Mia is the one who murdered Sasha and offers Artur an opportunity to avenge her. The latter takes the knife that was handed to him and, explaining his reasons for not taking it, he hands the knife to Lisa.

Following her husband's words, she puts the knife on the table and tells Nicolo to release an unconscious Ben. She checks him then restrains Kaya from stabbing Mia, understanding and sharing her sorrow.

Later, when the Jaegerists arrive to the restaurant, the Braus family is taken captive along with the Scouts present. They are taken to Shiganshina, where the entire group is imprisoned in the district's military headquarters. As the fight on the prison's rooftop ensues, Lisa and the other prisoners wonder what the sound overhead them was about.

Onyankopon releases the prisoners from their cell and Jean Kirschtein orders Nicolo to keep the Braus family safe. Nicolo escorts the Braus family through Shiganshina, leading them to a house in a relatively safe section where they can stay until the fighting is over. Lisa expresses concern over Mia and Ben, though Artur assures her that the two will be fine.

The family takes refuge in an abandoned building, but are forced to flee when they are found by a Pure Titan. Kaya trips and gets separated from the group, but is saved by the timely arrival of Mia, who explains that she has returned to rescue Falco. While Lisa comforts Kaya, the group is found by a group of soldiers who agree to escort them to the safety of the military's headquarters.

Later on in the military headquarters, the Braus family bid farewell to Gabi, who plans to leave for Ragako with Armin Arlelt to save Falco. Three years after the Rumbling and Eren Jaeger's death, Lisa and her family, alongside Nicolo, are seen walking by a Jaegerist ceremony.
